  "findings": [
    "T&P discharge pipe is missing, trapped, reduced in size, or terminates too high above the floor/drain."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reinstall the T&P discharge piping to run full-size, slope downward to drain completely without traps, and terminate no more than 6 inches above the floor or waste receptor."
  ],
  "rationale": "The Temperature and Pressure (T&P) relief valve discharge piping violates standard plumbing codes (IPC 504.6 and IRC P2804.6.1) because it is either missing, trapped (which can accumulate water and freeze or corrode), reduced in size (restricting safety relief flow), or terminates too high (creating a scalding hazard during discharge).",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.6",
    "IRC P2804.6.1"
  ]
}
